commit.message:
Remove all submodules, switch to vcpkg for Foundation and OTIO (#12)

* Remove all submodules, switch to vcpkg for Foundation and OTIO

- Delete .gitmodules, third_party/ directory, foundation submodule
- CMakeLists.txt: use find_package for arcvideo-foundation and OpenTimelineIO
- CI workflows: remove submodules, add overlay-ports from ArcVideoRegistry
- Add tools/InstallOverlayDeps.ps1 for interactive overlay-port management
- Update BUILD_GUIDE.md and README.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: split vcpkg install into base + overlay for fresh Foundation

Base packages (opencolorio, ffmpeg, qtbase, etc.) stay cached normally.
Overlay-port packages (arcvideo-foundation, opentimelineio) are always
removed and reinstalled fresh from ArcVideoRegistry, so Foundation
updates no longer require full cache invalidation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci(linux): clean stale registry dir before clone on self-hosted runner

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: restore USE_OTIO in ARCVIDEO_DEFINITIONS for consistency

Matches the USE_CRASHPAD pattern — explicitly define USE_OTIO when
OpenTimelineIO is found rather than relying solely on Foundation's
transitive export.

commit.message:
feat(api): implement Paddle subscription update with prorated billing

Replace the stub subscription update route with a real Paddle API
integration using PATCH /subscriptions/{id}.

Changes:
- New paddle-api-client.ts: server-side Paddle API utility using
  fetch + Bearer token auth (PADDLE_API_KEY env var)
- Rewritten subscription/update route: calls Paddle API with
  proration_billing_mode=prorated_immediately, no local DB write
  (DB updates via existing subscription.updated webhook processor)
- Ownership verification + active-status guard retained
- Customer-portal route: replaced PADDLE_PORTAL_ENABLED flag with
  PADDLE_API_KEY presence check (same pattern)
- Added PADDLE_API_KEY to .env.example and turbo.json globalEnv
- Removed obsolete PADDLE_PORTAL_ENABLED and
  PADDLE_SUBSCRIPTION_UPDATE_ENABLED feature flags
- Added SUBSCRIPTION_UPDATE to PAYMENT_ENDPOINTS

Fix: Make Magic screen UX improvements — overflow, visibility, tap-to-edit

Full P0/P1/P2 UX audit and implementation on the Step 4 'Make Magic'
review screen (magic_review_step.dart).

Key changes:
- Fixed RenderFlex overflow: wrapped setting/companion Columns in
  Flexible, reduced gap 32->24px, added ellipsis to circle labels
- Summary card background opacity 6%->14% (was nearly invisible at 1.1:1
  contrast ratio); border opacity increased; padding and font enlarged
- _SummaryRow now accepts onTap + shows edit icon; all rows wire to
  onGoBack callback for tap-to-edit navigation back to step 1
- wizard_story_screen.dart passes onGoBack: _previousStep to connect it
- Companion/setting circles scaled 72px->88px for better visual presence
- Hardcoded 'Companion' label replaced with actual companion name
- Golden character name label added below orb (was lost inside glow)
- Orb max clamp 250->220px to free vertical space on small screens

Impact: Resolves a visible overflow crash, makes summary cards readable
and interactive, and brings the screen closer to Toca Boca/Headspace Kids
quality standards for therapeutic children's apps.

Next steps: 4 remaining P2/P3 polish items (shimmer, stagger reveal,
color accent bars, inline companion avatars) — see handoff file.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
security: fix markdown XSS and add missing security headers (#1074)

- Markdown renderer: restrict link href to http/https/mailto protocols
  only, blocking javascript: URI XSS via crafted [text](javascript:...)
  payloads. Also add rel="noopener noreferrer" to rendered links.

- Security headers: add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff,
  X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin,
  Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

commit.message:
Fix GL context not active after glXMakeCurrent on older Mesa (Rocky Linux) (#360)

* Initial plan

* Fix GL context not active on older Mesa: always call glXMakeCurrent in set_gl_context

The previous set_gl_context implementation skipped glXMakeCurrent when
glXGetCurrentContext() already matched the requested context and
cached_window matched the FLTK window pointer.

On older Mesa builds (observed on Rocky Linux), glXMakeCurrent can
return True for a context whose framebuffer is not yet ready, leaving
glXGetCurrentContext() returning the handle while actual GL commands
(glGetString, rendering ops) fail.  FLTK's flush() calls make_current()
first, then calls glDrawBuffer(GL_BACK), which on these builds
de-activates the rendering pipeline without updating
glXGetCurrentContext().  When flush() then calls draw() → make_current(),
the stale cached comparison caused set_gl_context to skip the re-bind,
so the context was never properly re-established for that draw cycle.

The FLTK cube demo is unaffected because its draw() makes GL calls
directly (which trigger Mesa's lazy init) rather than calling
make_current() again.

Fix: always call glXMakeCurrent unconditionally.  Mesa detects a
redundant same-context/same-drawable call and returns True immediately
with no driver overhead, so this is safe and correct on all platforms.

Also:
- Fix prev_win diagnostic: was printing post-update cached_window
  (equal to w); now correctly captures the pre-update value.
- Add prev_draw (glXGetCurrentDrawable) to the diagnostic output.
- Update CoinPanel::draw() comment to explain the intentional second
  make_current() call and its role in the fix.

Co-authored-by: starseeker <238416+starseeker@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: starseeker <238416+starseeker@users.noreply.github.com>

Update Moshi to 1.15.2 to resolve transitive okio CVE-2023-3635 (#2480)

Moshi 1.14.0 pulls in `okio:2.10.0`, which is vulnerable to
CVE-2023-3635. Prior mitigation via dependency constraints in
build.gradle only worked for pipeline builds, not for independent
consuming apps. Bumping Moshi to 1.15.2 fixes this at the source
(`okio:3.7.0`).

- **`gradle/versions.gradle`**: `moshiVersion` / `moshiAdaptersVersion`
`1.14.0` → `1.15.2`
- **`changelog`**: Added vNext entry with PR number (#2480)
- **`common` submodule**: Updated to latest dev (`2ffd99c1d`) which
includes the parallel Moshi bump in common
- **dev merge**: Incorporated Release integration/8.2.3

Co-authored-by: robpitcher <robpitcher@microsoft.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

network: Fix duplicate inactive warnings and add announcement relay

- Downgrade MasternodeInactive NotFound to debug: when multiple peers
  simultaneously detect the same TCP disconnect, only the first removal
  succeeds — subsequent calls hit NotFound and are now silently ignored
  instead of spamming WARN logs

- cleanup_stale_reports: skip is_active gossip-override and auto-removal
  for Handshake (Free-tier) nodes entirely. Their presence in the registry
  means they ARE directly connected — TCP events own their lifecycle, not
  peer_report counts. Fixes 'X registered / Y active' discrepancy.

- handle_masternode_announcement: relay MasternodeAnnouncementV3 to all
  connected peers when a node is new to us. This propagates masternode
  knowledge transitively through the network so nodes not directly
  connected to a masternode still learn about it, include it in voting
  bitmaps, and award it rewards. Loop prevention: relay only fires on
  first registration (is_new check), so re-announcements from already-
  known nodes are absorbed without further propagation.

v0.0.5: response size reduction, veil synonyms, capability reconciliation

- Add tools/_response.py: compress_if_large() + image quality tier helpers
  Threshold driven by MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS env var (default 25K tokens × 4 chars)
  Aligns automatically with Copilot CLI truncation cutoff

- get_project_info: strip images by default (include_images=False)
  Images replaced with guidance strings pointing to new dedicated tools

- Add get_plate_thumbnail(name, file_path, plate_num, quality='standard')
- Add get_plate_topview(name, file_path, plate_num, quality='standard')
  quality: 'preview' (~5 KB) / 'standard' (~16 KB, default) / 'full' (~71 KB)

- list_sdcard_files: wire path parameter to filter to subtree
  path='/' returns full tree (backward compat); any other path returns subtree
  Large trees compressed via compress_if_large()

- data_collector.py: add Collection.to_summary(), PrinterDataCollector.get_summary(),
  PrinterDataCollector.get_collection(), DataCollector.get_summary/get_collection

- get_monitoring_history: add raw=False default (returns lightweight summary)
  raw=True preserves existing full time-series behavior

- Add get_monitoring_series(name, field): full series for one field, compressed

- get_snapshot: add quality param + include_status param
  Quality tiers use PIL resize + JPEG re-encode
  include_status=True adds live print telemetry to response

- Extract _build_status() helper in camera.py; simplify start_stream status_fn

- view_stream: add overlay_active=True to return value

- get_printer_state: docstring updated to recommend targeted sub-tools

- .github/copilot-instructions.md: veil synonym support (lower/drop/close/enable,
  lift/raise/open/disable); version bumped to 0.0.5

- knowledge/behavioral_rules.py: multi-level hierarchy pattern, image quality tiers,
  compressed response protocol, MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS configuration docs

- prompts/context.py: new tools, updated descriptions for changed tools

- pyproject.toml, README.md, PLAN.md: version 0.0.4 → 0.0.5; tool count 81 → 84

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(llm): long cooldown (1h) on quota-exhausted 429 vs generic rate-limit

When MiniMax returns 'usage limit exceeded', the daily token quota is
exhausted. Retrying every 30s is pointless and burns API calls.

- Detect 'usage limit exceeded' in error string → 3600s cooldown
- Generic 429 (per-minute rate limit) keeps the 30s cooldown
- Same fix applied to both chat() and stream() paths

commit.message:
fix: remove double Navigator.pop causing blank screen after avatar selection

When user tapped 'Use this look', avatar_gallery_selector called
Navigator.pop(context) AND then the onAvatarSelected callback in
hero_creator_step also called Navigator.of(ctx).pop(), popping
the wizard screen itself and leaving a blank screen.

Removed the redundant Navigator.pop from avatar_gallery_selector
so only the caller owns the single dialog close.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(elf): add comprehensive validation for dynamic tag values

Implements Issue 1.5 from IMPROVEMENT_FINDINGS.md (MEDIUM SEVERITY).

Changes:
- Add validateDynEntries() function to validate all critical dynamic tags
- Address-type tags (DT_SYMTAB, DT_STRTAB, DT_RELA, DT_JMPREL, etc.) must:
  * Be non-zero
  * Fall within [BaseVAddr, BaseVAddr+MemSize) address range
- Size-type tags (DT_STRSZ, DT_RELASZ, DT_PLTRELSZ) must:
  * DT_STRSZ must be non-zero if present
  * Not exceed total MemSize
- Validation occurs in readDynamicSection() after parsing entries
- Clear error messages identify which tag is invalid and provide context

Impact:
Malformed ELF files with invalid dynamic tags now fail early with clear
errors instead of causing out-of-bounds access during relocation or
symbol resolution.

Also marked completed items in IMPROVEMENT_FINDINGS.md:
- 1.1 Integer Overflow in RelaEnt Calculation ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.2 Bounds Validation Missing in Symbol Index Lookup ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.3 String Table Bounds Not Validated ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.4 Relocation Offset Not Validated ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.5 DynEntries Key Validation Missing ✅ (this commit)
- 2.1 Silent Relocation Errors in RelocationTags ✅ (already fixed)
- 2.2 Missing Error Handling in Symbol Table Loading ✅ (already fixed)
- 3.3 Dynamic Segment Not Validated for Completeness ✅ (already fixed)

Tests: All tests pass (excluding loader package race detector due to
pre-existing synthetic test data issue with checkptr).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: wire StrategyRunner into pipeline execution for matrix/parallel fan-out

Integrate StrategyRunner into StageRunner.runSingleJob() so matrix and
parallel strategies actually expand into multiple job instances during
pipeline execution. Previously, StrategyRunner existed with unit tests
but was never called from the runtime path.

Changes:
- stage-runner.ts: Add runSingleJob→runStrategyJob→runJobInstance flow
  that detects strategy on RegularJobDefinition, expands via
  StrategyRunner, and runs instances with maxParallel throttling
- schema.ts: Use z.coerce.string() for matrix values to handle YAML
  booleans/numbers (e.g., optimize: true)
- variable-manager.ts: Add typeof guard in resolveRuntimeExpressions
  to handle non-string variable values gracefully
- runtime-execution.test.ts: Replace single basic matrix test with 6
  comprehensive E2E tests covering 2-config, 3-config, partial failure,
  maxParallel throttling, parallel strategy, and matrix with outputs
- README.md: Expand matrix strategy docs with env var syntax, parallel
  strategy section, and instance naming explanation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: plug memory leaks in MFA tracker, computed field cache, permission cache (#1073)

- MfaAttempts: add LastActivityUtc tracking + periodic scavenge (every 60s)
  that evicts entries idle >10 min. RegisterSuccess now removes the key
  entirely. Prevents unbounded growth from unique IP/user combinations.

- ComputedFieldService: add lazy scavenge (every 30s) that purges expired
  cache entries + hard cap at 10k entries. Previously expired entries
  accumulated forever in the ConcurrentDictionary.

- PermissionResolver: Invalidate() now clears the entire cache instead of
  only bumping the generation counter. Stale entries for inactive users
  previously accumulated indefinitely.

Co-authored-by: root <root@localhost.localdomain>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

button_showcase_screen.dart:

  (screen is in lib/screens/, buttons are in lib/widgets/buttons/)

- Fix AppTheme.textMuted → AppTheme.textSecondary (correct name in theme)

widget_test.dart:
- Fix broken smoke test: MyApp → HydroMeshApp (the actual app class name)

app_config.dart:
- Add localhost/production switch (_useLocalhost flag)
- Local IP: 192.168.0.170:3000 for physical device testing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix sync loop not responding promptly to new files or force sync

The sync loop was calling time.sleep(sync_interval) unconditionally,
causing watchdog events and force sync signals to be ignored for up to
5 minutes (the default sync interval).

- Add threading.Event (_wakeup_event) to SyncDaemon
- Set the event in SyncEventHandler._queue_change so watchdog-detected
  file changes wake the sync loop immediately
- Replace time.sleep(sync_interval) with a 1-second polling loop that
  breaks early on _wakeup_event or force_sync_path signal file

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct 16 wrong GAMS variable names across 13 module docs

Systematic verification of all 640+ GAMS variable references in AI docs
against actual GAMS codebase found 18 mismatches (now 14 fixed, 4 annotated).

Wrong prefix fixes:
- p15_waste_scen → s15_waste_scen (scalar, not parameter)
- vm_nr_surplus → v50_nr_surplus_cropland (local, not interface)
- f22_conservation_fader → p22_conservation_fader

Wrong name fixes:
- pm_tau(t) → pcm_tau(j,tautype) (module_14)
- pm_carbon_density_secdforest → pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac (module_29)
- vm_cost_wat → vm_water_cost (3 occurrences in module_42)
- ic42_pumping_cost replaces invented s42_pumping_cost (module_42)
- vm_demand → vm_supply (module_17)
- s30_rotation_scenario_speed → s30_rotation_scenario_start (module_30)

Invented names replaced:
- s13_tau_response → actual param reference (module_14)
- s14_yld_bioen_scaling → s14_carbon_fraction (module_14)

Conceptual code annotated:
- vm_import/vm_export in module_21 → replaced with actual GAMS equations
- vm_prod_initial/vm_prod_calibrated in module_40 → annotated as pseudo-code
- pm_carbon_density_ac in module_28 → expanded to actual param names
- f57_maccs in module_57 → clarified as f57_maccs_<type>
- im_gdp_pc_ppp in module_09 → annotated as hypothetical

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
